_comment: Auto-Claude hook config. Replace /path/to/auto-claude with actual absolute path.

hooks._comment: Independent Haiku review — NOT self-scoring. Haiku evaluates, scores, and injects results.

hooks.command: bash -c 'SOCKET=${CHANNEL_SOCKET:-$HOME/.auto-claude/channel.sock}; [ -S "$SOCKET" ] && curl -s --max-time 5 --unix-socket "$SOCKET" -X POST http://localhost/notify -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"message\":\"CC error, needs manual intervention\",\"event_type\":\"error\"}" &>/dev/null || true'
